name: Shibu Kawa-ni (Chestnuts Cooked in Green Tea)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peeled chestnuts in a saucepan and cover with cold water. Add the green tea leaves.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes until the chestnuts are tender and show no resistance when pierced.
3. Drain the chestnuts and rinse under cold running water. Leave the brown membrane intact.
4. In a separate saucepan, combine 3/8 pint (approximately 1 cup) of water, sugar, and the chestnuts.
5. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat and simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the soy sauce and continue to simmer for 5 more minutes.
7. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature before serving.
